name: Georgian Fruit Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together in a large mixing bowl.
2. Pour the syrup, the purees, and the water over the dry mixture.
3. Add the cream cheese in chunks. Mix by hand using your hands by working under the dry ingredients from the sides. Use a folding motion and mix until all ingredients are thoroughly blended together.
4. Add the diced apples and the raisins. Mix them into the dough by the same folding method.
5. Add the cream or half-and-half and fold until completely blended.
6. Make 24 round balls of the dough. Place on a well greased baking sheet, slightly squash the top of each loaf and bake for 50-55 minutes in pre-heated 300 degree F oven.
